name: book return
script: frappe.listview\_settings['Book return'] = { refresh: function(listview) { listview.page.set\_primary\_action('Scan to Return', function() { let d = new frappe.ui.Dialog({ title: 'Scan to Return', fields: [{ fieldname: 'isbn', fieldtype: 'Data', label: 'Book ISBN / Barcode', reqd: 1 }], primary\_action\_label: 'Find Book', primary\_action: function(values) { d.hide(); frappe.call({ method: 'frappe.client.get\_list', args: { doctype: 'Library Book', filters: {'isbn': values.isbn}, fields: ['name', 'title'], limit: 1 }, callback: function(book\_r) { if (!book\_r.message || book\_r.message.length === 0) { frappe.msgprint({ title: 'Not Found', message: 'No book found for ISBN: ' + values.isbn, indicator: 'red' }); return; } let book\_name = book\_r.message[0].name; let book\_title = book\_r.message[0].title; frappe.call({ method: 'frappe.client.get\_list', args: { doctype: 'Book Issue', filters: { 'library\_book': book\_name, 'issue\_status': ['in', ['Issued', 'Overdue']] }, fields: ['name', 'library\_book', 'library\_member', 'member\_name', 'issue\_date', 'due\_date'], limit: 1 }, callback: function(issue\_r) { if (!issue\_r.message || issue\_r.message.length === 0) { frappe.msgprint({ title: 'Not Issued', message: book\_title + ' is not currently issued to anyone.', indicator: 'blue' }); return; } let issue = issue\_r.message[0]; let today = frappe.datetime.get\_today(); let diff = frappe.datetime.get\_diff( frappe.datetime.str\_to\_obj(today), frappe.datetime.str\_to\_obj(issue.due\_date) ); let days\_overdue = diff > 0 ? diff : 0; let fine = days\_overdue \* 5; let html = ''; html += '  **Member:** ' + issue.member\_name + '  '; html += '  **Book:** ' + book\_title + '  '; html += '  **Due Date:** ' + issue.due\_date + '  '; if (days\_overdue > 0) { html += '  **Days Overdue:** ' + days\_overdue + '  '; html += '  **Fine:** Rs.' + fine + '  '; } else { html += '  **Returned on time - No Fine!**  '; } html += ''; let result\_d = new frappe.ui.Dialog({ title: days\_overdue > 0 ? 'Overdue Return' : 'On Time Return', fields: [ {fieldtype: 'HTML', options: html}, { fieldname: 'book\_condition', fieldtype: 'Select', label: 'Book Condition', options: 'Good\nDamaged\nPages Missing', default: 'Good' } ], primary\_action\_label: 'Confirm Return', primary\_action: function(vals) { result\_d.hide(); frappe.call({ method: 'frappe.client.insert', args: { doc: { doctype: 'Book return', book\_issue: issue.name, library\_member: issue.library\_member, library\_book: issue.library\_book, return\_date: today, book\_condition: vals.book\_condition } }, callback: function(r) { if (r.message) { frappe.show\_alert({ message: fine > 0 ? 'Return saved! Fine Rs.' + fine + ' created.' : 'Return saved! No fine.', indicator: 'green' }); listview.refresh(); } } }); } }); result\_d.show(); } }); } }); } }); d.show(); }, 'octicon octicon-repo-pull'); } };
